title: Embrace the Light!
description: Makes light source blocks glow slightly warmer and decreases visibility during nights and in caves.
body:
*   Makes light source blocks glow slightly warmer and decreases visibility during nights and in caves.
    *   Visibility during the night is normal during full moons, decreases when closer to a new moon and then increases again.
*   Caves are about 50% darker than in vanilla, making torches more valuable.
*   Night Vision slowly fades out rather than brightly flash.
*   Armor Trims glow in the dark.

Based on the [Nicer Skies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nicer-skies) mod.

***

### Compatiblity:

*   Turn off colored ambient lights in [Alex's Caves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves) config.

***

This mod was made for my upcoming modpack - 'A Distant Journey'. It does not come with a config, so every change is pretty much hardcoded. I might port it to Fabric or newer versions if I need it, but if not, it will be exclusive to Forge 1.20.1.
